key_themes: Strong earnings beats and record revenue growth in Q1 2026
Raised full-year guidance for sales and EPS
Analyst upgrades and bullish price targets amid aerospace and defense demand
Premium valuation concerns and recent price pullback
summary: Moog Inc. (MOG.A) demonstrated robust performance in Q1 2026 with a 21% revenue increase to $1.1 billion and EPS of $2.63, beating estimates and prompting raised full-year guidance to $4.3 billion in sales and $10.20 EPS. Analysts have upgraded price targets, citing strong aerospace and defense backlogs, though the stock trades at a premium and faces tariff-related margin risks. The biggest risk is persistent tariff headwinds potentially compressing profitability despite solid demand.
